subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come with the truth is verily the Lord of all worlds and the Most Great Name through Whom He hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی بالحق انه هو مولی العالم و الاسم الاعظم الذی به ظهر
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
